modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble signing up for USD’s Research Listserv

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to sign up for the Research Listserv at USD, but I can’t figure it out. I just want to get the info, but the process seems confusing. Can someone help me with how to do this? I really want to be part of it!
short_description: Trouble signing up for USD’s Research Listserv
description: I’m trying to sign up for the Research Listserv at USD, but I can’t figure it out. I just want to get the info, but the process seems confusing. Can someone help me with how to do this? I really want to be part of it!
